name: Execution via Control Panel Items
description: Detects the execution of binaries through Control Panel items, a form of Signed Binary Proxy Execution.

prompts.prompt: Suspicious execution via Control Panel item detected, indicating potential Signed Binary Proxy Execution for defense evasion. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **Image Path** {Image}, **Parent Image Path** {ParentImage}, **Command Line** {CommandLine}, **User** {User}, **Computer** {Computer}. Investigate this activity for unauthorized execution or malicious payload delivery.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path of the executed file (control.exe).

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path of the parent process.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line used, including 'control' and 'cpl' arguments.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The computer on which the event occurred.
